pain_points: Scattered market research and sales data across multiple systems
Cannot quickly correlate sales spikes with market trends or customer segments
Product performance analysis takes days instead of minutes
Missing connections between customer feedback, regional preferences, and inventory turnover
Competitive intelligence trapped in spreadsheets while opportunities pass by
use_cases: Real-time regional trend analysis (Southeast bass fishing vs. Northwest fly fishing)
Seasonal demand prediction (spring turkey season, fall deer hunting)
Customer segment analysis (weekend warriors vs. serious anglers vs. family campers)
Product bundle opportunity identification based on purchase patterns
New product category discovery from search queries and competitor intelligence
customer_context.scale: Millions of transactions across hunting, fishing, camping, and outdoor lifestyle categories
